goal: Add sum.js exporting sum(a,b)=a+b with a passing node:test

sprints.title: Implement sum module
sprints.description: Create sum.js that exports a sum function taking two arguments a and b and returning their arithmetic sum (a + b). Use a module export format compatible with the project's setup (CommonJS module.exports or ESM export) so it can be imported by the test file.

sprints.title: Add passing node:test suite
sprints.description: Create a test file using Node's built-in node:test module and node:assert. Import sum from sum.js and add at least one test case asserting sum(a,b) === a+b (e.g. sum(2,3) === 5). Ensure the test runs and passes via `node --test`.
